reasoning: The resolution date is Dec 31, 2025, less than two months from the knowledge cutoff of Nov 9, 2025. While Iran had a large stockpile of highly enriched uranium by mid-2025, Israeli and US military strikes in June 2025 ("Rising Lion" and "Midnight Hammer") inflicted extensive damage on key nuclear facilities. US intelligence assessed in June that Iran had not made the political decision to build a weapon. Furthermore, a DIA report estimated the strikes introduced a delay of up to six months. Even under the most aggressive weaponization timelines (an estimated three months for a crude device), the combination of recovering from the delay and weaponizing makes a completed and officially confirmed weapon by the end of 2025 virtually impossible. Lacking any credible reports of completion by November 2025, the probability is extremely low.
